attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RN)+NFRT.MAX_FDI_BKG_TRX_KEY AS FDI_BOOKINGS_TRX_KEY
, BOOKED_DT
, BOOKINGS_PCT
, ORDERED_DT
, ORDER_NUM
, TRANSACTION_NUM
, CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
, CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
, BILL_TO_CUST_SITE_USE_ID_INT
, ORG_ID
, END_CUSTOMER_NAME
, SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME
, EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST_USD_AMT
, EXTENDED_STANDARD_PRICE_USD_AM
, EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT
, EXTENDED_BASE_PRICE_USD_AMT
, ORDER_QTY
, ACQUISITION_SOURCE_CD
, CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG
, SHIP_TO_CUST_SITE_USE_ID_INT
, ACQUISITION_PRODUCT_ID
, CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY
, COMPANY_CD
, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
, TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
, EDW_CREATE_DTM
, EDW_CREATE_USER
, EDW_UPDATE_DTM
, EDW_UPDATE_USER
, FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
, FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
, SALES_REP_NUMBER
, ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD
, INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_REVENUE_FLG
, SALES_ORDER_CREATE_DTM
, SERVICE_FLG
, ADJUSTMENT_CD
, ITEM_TYPE_CD
, ORDER_CATEGORY_CD
, LINE_CREATION_DTM
, DV_LINE_CREATION_DT
, SHIPPED_QTY
, SPLIT_PCT
,FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
,FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE
,FISCAL_WEEK_NUMBER_INT
FROM
(
SELECT
 RANDOM(1,1000000) RN
, BOOKED_DT
, BOOKINGS_PCT
, ORDERED_DT
, ORDER_NUM
, TRANSACTION_NUM
, CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
, CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
, BILL_TO_CUST_SITE_USE_ID_INT
, ORG_ID
, END_CUSTOMER_NAME
, SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME
, EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST_USD_AMT
, EXTENDED_STANDARD_PRICE_USD_AM
, EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT
, EXTENDED_BASE_PRICE_USD_AMT
, ORDER_QTY
, ACQUISITION_SOURCE_CD
, CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG
, SHIP_TO_CUST_SITE_USE_ID_INT
, ACQUISITION_PRODUCT_ID
, CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY
, COMPANY_CD
, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
, TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
, EDW_CREATE_DTM
, EDW_CREATE_USER
, EDW_UPDATE_DTM
, EDW_UPDATE_USER
, R.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
, FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
, SALES_REP_NUMBER
, ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD
, INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_REVENUE_FLG
, SALES_ORDER_CREATE_DTM
, SERVICE_FLG
, ADJUSTMENT_CD
, ITEM_TYPE_CD
, ORDER_CATEGORY_CD
, LINE_CREATION_DTM
, DV_LINE_CREATION_DT
, SHIPPED_QTY
, SPLIT_PCT
,FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
,FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE
,FISCAL_WEEK_NUMBER_INT
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_APSP_FDI_BOOKINGS_TRX
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_WEEK_TO_YEAR R
ON FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_INT=FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
) WFRT,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(FDI_BOOKINGS_TRX_KEY),0) AS MAX_FDI_BKG_TRX_KEY 
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_APSP_FDI_BOOKINGS_TRX) NFRT

SELECT 
-999 AS FDI_BOOKINGS_TRX_KEY
,DATE_BOOKED
,BOOKINGS_PERCENT
,DATE_ORDERED
,ORDER_NUMBER
,TRANSACTION_NUMBER
,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN PO_TYPE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE PO_TYPE END AS PO_TYPE
, BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,ORG_ID
,END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME
,CASE WHEN SFBT.USD_EXT_STANDARD_COST*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFBT.USD_EXT_STANDARD_COST*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXT_STANDARD_COST
,CASE WHEN USD_EXT_STANDARD_PRICE IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 ELSE USD_EXT_STANDARD_PRICE END AS USD_EXT_STANDARD_PRICE
,CASE WHEN  SFBT.USD_EXT_SELLING_PRICE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1)  IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 ELSE 
SFBT.USD_EXT_SELLING_PRICE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1)  END USD_EXT_SELLING_PRICE
,CASE WHEN USD_EXT_BASE_PRICE IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 ELSE USD_EXT_BASE_PRICE END AS USD_EXT_BASE_PRICE
,SFBT.EXT_QUANTITY*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) EXT_QUANTITY
,CASE WHEN ACQUISITION_SOURCE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE ACQUISITION_SOURCE END AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE
,CASE WHEN CORP_BKG_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE CORP_BKG_FLAG END AS CORP_BKG_FLAG
,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,PRODUCT_ID
,CASE WHEN PRODUCT_KEY IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE PRODUCT_KEY END AS PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE END AS FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
,CASE WHEN WCCM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE WCCM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CASE WHEN CURRENCY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE CURRENCY_CODE END AS CURRENCY_CODE
,RFMT.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
,COALESCE(ESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_REP_NUMBER
,COALESCE(SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD
,COALESCE(SFBT.IC_REVENUE_FLAG,'N') AS INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_REVENUE_FLG
,SFBT.HEADER_CREATION_DATE  AS SALES_ORDER_CREATE_DTM
,COALESCE(SFBT.SERVICE_FLAG,'N') AS SERVICE_FLG
,SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_CODE AS ADJUSTMENT_CD
,SFBT.ITEM_TYPE_CODE AS ITEM_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE(SFBT.ORDER_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') AS ORDER_CATEGORY_CD
,SFBT.LINE_CREATION_DATE AS LINE_CREATION_DTM
,CAST(LINE_CREATION_DATE  AS DATE) AS DV_LINE_CREATION_DT
,COALESCE(SFBT.SHIPPED_QUANTITY ,0.0000000) AS SHIPPED_QTY
,COALESCE(SFBT.SPLIT_PERCENT ,0.00)AS SPLIT_PCT
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_FDI_TD_BOOKINGS_TRX SFBT
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_WEEK_TO_YEAR RFMT
ON SFBT.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND SFBT.FISCAL_WEEK_NUM_INT=RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WEBEX_CISCO_COMPANY_MAP WCCM
ON SFBT.THEATER = WCCM.THEATER
AND SFBT.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = WCCM.CISCO_COMPANY
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(SELECT SALES_REP_ID,SALES_REP_NUMBER   FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_REP_ID 
 ORDER BY CASE WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 1  WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END)=1  ) ESR 
ON SFBT.SALESREP_ID=ESR.SALES_REP_ID
WHERE SFBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NULL

SELECT 
 SFBT.BATCH_ID
,SFBT.UNIQUE_ROW_ID
,SFBT.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
,SFBT.ACQUISITION_SOURCE
,SFBT.PRODUCT_KEY
,SFBT.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
,SFBT.SERVICE_FLAG
,SFBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SFBT.TIME_HIERARCHY_KEY
,SFBT.TMS_PHV_LEVEL_4_ID
,SFBT.TMS_SALES_LEVEL_4_ID
,SFBT.PRODUCT_ID
,SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_CODE
,SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE
,SFBT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,SFBT.END_CUSTOMER_ID
,SFBT.ORG_ID
,SFBT.SALESREP_ID
,SFBT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,SFBT.THEATER
,SFBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID
,SFBT.ACQUISITION_FLAG
,SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
,SFBT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_NAME
,SFBT.BOOKINGS_PERCENT
,SFBT.CM_ADJ_FLAG
,SFBT.CONVERSION_RATE
,SFBT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE
,SFBT.CORP_BKG_FLAG
,SFBT.CURRENCY_CODE
,SFBT.DATE_BOOKED
,SFBT.DATE_ORDERED
,SFBT.EIS_ADJ_FLAG
,SFBT.END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SFBT.EXT_QUANTITY
,SFBT.HEADER_CREATION_DATE
,SFBT.HEADER_ID
,SFBT.IC_REVENUE_FLAG
,SFBT.ITEM_TYPE_CODE
,SFBT.LINE_CREATION_DATE
,SFBT.LINE_ID
,SFBT.ORDER_CATEGORY
,SFBT.ORDER_NUMBER
,SFBT.ORDER_TYPE_ID
,SFBT.PO_TYPE
,SFBT.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,SFBT.REVENUE_FLAG
,SFBT.SALESREP_FLAG
,SFBT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_NAME
,SFBT.SHIPPED_QUANTITY
,SFBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SFBT.SPLIT_PERCENT
,SFBT.TRANSACTION_NUMBER
,SFBT.USD_EXT_BASE_PRICE
,SFBT.USD_EXT_SELLING_PRICE
,SFBT.USD_EXT_STANDARD_COST
,SFBT.USD_EXT_STANDARD_PRICE
,SFBT.CREATE_DATE
,SFBT.FISCAL_WEEK_NUM_INT
,SFBT.TIME_HIERARCHY_DATE
,SFBT.CREATE_DATETIME
,SFBT.ACTION_CODE
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_FDI_TD_BOOKINGS_TRX SFBT
WHERE SFBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
 WHERE 
 NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SFBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)

SELECT 
 -1 AS BATCH_ID,
 WEBEX_COMPANY,
 CISCO_COMPANY,
 COMPANY_DESC,
 FINANCIAL_COMPANY_KEY,
 THEATER,
 SL6_DESCRIPTION,
 SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 SALES_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
 SUB_SALES_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
 PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
 ACTION_CODE,
 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WEBEX_CISCO_COMPANY_MAP  WCCM
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
WHERE 
NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WCCM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)

SELECT -999 AS FDI_BOOKINGS_TRX_KEY
,DATE_BOOKED
,BOOKINGS_PERCENT
,DATE_ORDERED
,ORDER_NUMBER
,TRANSACTION_NUMBER
,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
, PO_TYPE
,BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,ORG_ID
,END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME
, USD_EXT_STANDARD_COST
, USD_EXT_STANDARD_PRICE
, USD_EXT_SELLING_PRICE
,USD_EXT_BASE_PRICE
,EXT_QUANTITY
, ACQUISITION_SOURCE
, CORP_BKG_FLAG
,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,PRODUCT_ID
, PRODUCT_KEY
, FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
,SFBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CURRENCY_CODE
,RFMT.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
,COALESCE(SFBT.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(SFBT.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_REVENUE_FLG,'N')
,SFBT.SALES_ORDER_CREATE_DTM
,COALESCE(SFBT.SERVICE_FLG,'N')
,COALESCE(SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_CD,'UNKNOWN')
,SFBT.ITEM_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE(SFBT.ORDER_CATEGORY_CD,'UNKNOWN')
,SFBT.LINE_CREATION_DTM
,SFBT.DV_LINE_CREATION_DT
,COALESCE(SFBT.SHIPPED_QTY,0.0000000)
,COALESCE(SFBT.SPLIT_PCT,0.00) 
 FROM
(SELECT 
DATE_BOOKED
,BOOKINGS_PERCENT
,DATE_ORDERED
,ORDER_NUMBER
,TRANSACTION_NUMBER
,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN PO_TYPE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE PO_TYPE END AS PO_TYPE
,BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,ORG_ID
 ,END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME
,CASE WHEN USD_EXT_STANDARD_COST IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 ELSE USD_EXT_STANDARD_COST END AS USD_EXT_STANDARD_COST
,CASE WHEN USD_EXT_STANDARD_PRICE IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 ELSE USD_EXT_STANDARD_PRICE END AS USD_EXT_STANDARD_PRICE
,CASE WHEN USD_EXT_SELLING_PRICE IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 ELSE USD_EXT_SELLING_PRICE END AS USD_EXT_SELLING_PRICE
,CASE WHEN USD_EXT_BASE_PRICE IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 ELSE USD_EXT_BASE_PRICE END AS USD_EXT_BASE_PRICE
,EXT_QUANTITY
,CASE WHEN ACQUISITION_SOURCE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE ACQUISITION_SOURCE END AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE
,CASE WHEN CORP_BKG_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE CORP_BKG_FLAG END AS CORP_BKG_FLAG
,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID
,PRODUCT_ID
,CASE WHEN PRODUCT_KEY IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE PRODUCT_KEY END AS PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE END AS FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
,CASE WHEN SFBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SFBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CASE WHEN CURRENCY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE CURRENCY_CODE END AS CURRENCY_CODE
, FISCAL_MONTH_ID
,FISCAL_WEEK_NUM_INT
,ESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER
,SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE AS ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD
,SFBT.IC_REVENUE_FLAG AS INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_REVENUE_FLG
,SFBT.HEADER_CREATION_DATE  AS SALES_ORDER_CREATE_DTM
,SFBT.SERVICE_FLAG AS SERVICE_FLG
,SFBT.ADJUSTMENT_CODE AS ADJUSTMENT_CD
,SFBT.ITEM_TYPE_CODE AS ITEM_TYPE_CD
,SFBT.ORDER_CATEGORY AS ORDER_CATEGORY_CD
,SFBT.LINE_CREATION_DATE AS LINE_CREATION_DTM
,CAST(SFBT.LINE_CREATION_DATE  AS DATE) AS DV_LINE_CREATION_DT
,SFBT.SHIPPED_QUANTITY AS SHIPPED_QTY
,SFBT.SPLIT_PERCENT AS SPLIT_PCT,
SFBT.CREATE_DATE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_FDI_TD_BOOKINGS_TRX SFBT
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(SELECT SALES_REP_ID,SALES_REP_NUMBER   FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_REP_ID ORDER BY CASE WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 1  WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END)=1  ) ESR 
ON SFBT.SALESREP_ID=ESR.SALES_REP_ID
WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL
) SFBT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_WEEK_TO_YEAR RFMT
 ON SFBT.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND SFBT.FISCAL_WEEK_NUM_INT=RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT

SELECT
CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY PRODUCT_KEY,
-9999 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-9999 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
CAST (TRIM(COALESCE(NBT.CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY  ,-999)) || '~' || TRIM(COALESCE(NBT.CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY  ,-999)) ||  '~' ||'-9999'||  '~' ||'-9999' AS VARCHAR(70))  DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_APSP_FDI_BOOKINGS_TRX NBT,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMT
WHERE RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE  IN (0,1,2,3) 
/*AND NPFT.FCST_FOR_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND FLOOR(DV_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUMBER_INT/100)=RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND NFRT.FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT  = RFMT.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT */
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS )
GROUP BY 1,2,5
